summary: Default policy probe with MIND+LIGHT and low side-effect tolerance
description: Expands to decide with a formatted objective and fixed aspects. Prefer this over hand-writing full intent JSON when you want a repeatable coherence check and arcane_provenance on the result.
recommended_for: Routine ALLOW/RESHAPE/DENY checks where you only vary the subject (topic)
Agents that should send fewer fields than a full intent + aspects object
